import React from 'react'; import { Globe, Linkedin, Twitter, Youtube } from 'lucide-react'; import tanuhLogo from '../assets/tanuh.png'; import iiscLogo from '../assets/IISc_logo.png'; const LoginPage = () => { const socialLinks = [ { icon: , url: process.env.REACT_APP_WEBSITE_URL, label: 'Website' }, { icon: , url: process.env.REACT_APP_LINKEDIN_URL, label: 'LinkedIn' }, { icon: , url: process.env.REACT_APP_TWITTER_URL, label: 'Twitter' }, { icon: , url: process.env.REACT_APP_YOUTUBE_URL, label: 'YouTube' }, ]; return (
{socialLinks.map((link, index) => ( {link.icon} {link.label} ))}

Login

); }; export default LoginPage;
